summary: Stripe live wiring (006) + real hero image (Track C). Inklings now end-to-end ready for launch — once Cursor mints Price IDs and they land in /var/www/inklings/.env, the [Try Premium] and [Order Print] CTAs go from 503 to working Stripe Checkout sessions.

files_added: src/lib/stripe.ts (getStripe + price-id helpers, gracefully returns null when SDK key missing)
src/app/api/billing/checkout/route.ts (real Stripe Checkout — premium subscription with 14-day trial OR print one-time, with shipping_address_collection)
src/app/api/billing/portal/route.ts (Stripe Customer Portal session for self-serve subscription management)
src/app/api/billing/webhook/route.ts (signature-verified, handles checkout.session.completed for both subscription + payment, customer.subscription.updated/deleted)
files_modified: src/app/portal/settings/page.tsx ('Open billing portal' button now POSTs to /api/billing/portal)
B_stripe_live.graceful_fallback: All three routes 503 with a clear error_code when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY or required Price IDs are missing — kid never sees an error, parent gets a clean message
B_stripe_live.operator_blocked_on: Cursor minting Price IDs in Stripe Dashboard. Once STRIPE_PRICE_PREMIUM_MONTHLY + STRIPE_PRICE_PRINT_BOOK + STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET are set in /var/www/inklings/.env, no code change needed — checkout goes live on next pm2 restart.

C_hero_image.prompt: cozy childrens book illustration, warm pastel storybook, a small child with a golden puppy and a magical fox in a sunlit meadow, soft palette of cream and coral and mint and plum, no text, flat color, friendly, age-appropriate, hand-drawn feel, vertical composition
C_hero_image.swapped_into: src/app/page.tsx home hero (replaced the Sparkles + 'illustration coming soon' placeholder)

what_launch_ready_means_now: Marketing site fully illustrated (real hero image)
Stripe Checkout code paths exist and 503 cleanly until Price IDs land
Webhook handler verifies signature + updates subscription tier on events
All CRUD flows working end-to-end (parent signup → child profile → kid character + story → parent approve → ready for Stripe + KDP print)
